content:
# Geochronology

**Summary**: The science of determining the age of rocks and minerals.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] applied geochronology to date the granitoid pulses.

## Key Subtopics

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] U-Pb zircon dating, SHRIMP analysis

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] SHRIMP U-Pb dating

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Identified two distinct pulses: 640-624 Ma for A-types and 618-598 Ma for I-types. ([[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024, p. 17]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] Resolving complex multi-stage magmatism.
